There are several Discord servers that make up The Portal Community.

* '''[https://discord.gg/TDbpwzz The Portal Group]''' – The main server for The Portal community. Focused on building projects that Eric muses about and the math behind [[Geometric Unity]].
* '''[https://discord.gg/v2gKpkq The Portal Book Club]''' – A book club primarily focused on one of Eric's favorite books, The Road to Reality by Roger Penrose.
* '''[https://discord.gg/wu957e7 The Portal Transcripts]''' – If you would like to help transcribe episodes of The Portal Podcast, this is where we coordinate.

[[Category:Community]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
